stemHtml: A chart meets the ICAO recommendation for conformity. What does it mean for you when you intend to use it for navigational purposes?

options.a: Meridians are printed as vertical lines perpendicular to the edges of the chart.
options.b: A straight line drawn on the chart will approximate a great circle.
options.c: A straight line of the chart between two points does not necessarily represent the shortest distance between those points on the Earth.
options.d: For two same sized squares drawn on the chart at different locations, the underlying ground of the Earth will have the same surface size.
